properties.name: bucket4j.cache-to-use
properties.description:
Sets the cache implementation which should be auto configured. This property can be used if multiple caches are configured by the starter and you have to choose one due to a startup error.
  • jcache
  • hazelcast
  • ignite
  • redis

properties.name: bucket4j.default-http-response-body
properties.description: The HTTP content which should be used in case of rate limiting

properties.name: bucket4j.default-method-metric-tags
properties.description: A list of default metric tags which should be applied to all methods. Additional configuration is necessary as the evaluation context for resolving tag expression is different from filters.

properties.name: bucket4j.default-metric-tags
properties.description: A list of default metric tags which should be applied to all filters

properties.name: bucket4j.enabled
properties.description: Enables or disables the Bucket4j Spring Boot Starter.

properties.name: bucket4j.filter-config-cache-name
properties.description: If Filter configuration caching is enabled, a cache with this name should exist, or it will cause an exception.

properties.name: bucket4j.methods
properties.description: Configuration for the {@link RateLimiting} annotation on method level.
